reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) When I passed by on my way to and from Atacama, there was nothing to eat at the snack bar, and on the way back the truck was just starting to unload fuel; we waited for more than an hour to refuel. But nothing to complain about, the place is in the middle of nowhere and it must be difficult to keep things running smoothly there.

(Original)
Quando passei na ida e depois também na volta do atacama, não havia nada para comer na lancheria, e na volta o caminhão estava começando a descarregar o combustivel, foi mais de uma hora de espera para abastecer. Mas nada a reclamar, o local é no meio do nada e deve ser dificil manter as coisas funcionando bem por lá.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURqM09uMEFREAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Based on the service from the employees, both at the convenience store and the pumps, this was the worst YPF station we've ever been to. What a bunch of unhelpful staff! Dirty bathrooms.

(Original)
Pelo atendimento dos funcionários,  tanto da conveniência,  quanto das bombas,  foi o pior posto Ypf em que passamos. Ô pessoalzinho de má vontade! Banheiros sujos.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURqb1BINWxnRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) The gas station is decent, but the attendants are unwilling to provide service, the same goes for the convenience store staff, especially since it's the only station in the area and there's no competition. They provide any kind of service, the bathrooms are somewhat neglected, and something the city really lacks is decent internet and Claro mobile signal, because only one type of cell phone works there, and even then it's very weak.

(Original)
Posto razoável frentistas com má vontade em atendimento mesma coisa com pessoal da conveniência principalmente por saber em que é o único posto na região por não ter concorrência atende de qualquer jeito banheiros meio abandonados e algo que faz falta da cidade é internet decente e sinal da operadora Claro por que só pega um tipo de celular lá e mal e porcamente
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqNmIyMmJnEAE
